name: closeout
long_description:
### Description
* A single match play bet for the full 18 holes.
* Lower net score wins each hole. Ties are halved.
* When a player falls behind by the press trigger (default 2 down), a new press bet is automatically created.
* Press bets are for the same amount as the original bet.
### How It Differs from Nassau
* One bet covering the entire round instead of three separate bets (front, back, overall).
* Presses are the primary way to create additional action.
